scripts.render:hero-gif: remotion render HeroGif --image-format png --sequence out/hero-frames && gifski --fps 15 --width 1660 --quality 80 -o out/hero.gif out/hero-frames/*.png
scripts.render:social-gif: remotion render SocialGif --image-format png --sequence out/social-frames && gifski --fps 15 --width 1200 --quality 80 -o out/social.gif out/social-frames/*.png
scripts.render:stills: remotion still PHSlide1 out/ph-1.png && remotion still PHSlide2 out/ph-2.png && remotion still PHSlide3 out/ph-3.png && remotion still PHSlide4 out/ph-4.png && remotion still PHSlide5 out/ph-5.png
scripts.render:all: pnpm render:video && pnpm render:hero-gif && pnpm render:og && pnpm render:social-gif && pnpm render:stills
